Hey guys, I wanna try my first 5-team D-zone run - I've been raising up a bunch of units in preperation, but am unsure about the best team formations for them.

Probably Mouchette Thais Helot Aigis for one, and Lemurian Squad for another, but unsure the best way to assemble the other two sets, and if there's a friend unit I could get that could solo one of the nodes (since I only have 16 units leveled up lol)
you could borrow a kath or mouchette and solo a w3
Fantastic. And I can still use my own mouchette later if I use a friend's one, yeah?
yupp

jenkin + castor can be another team (+keyflare bot + either winkle or some dr holding filler), for the 4th team you can use caecus dps with a more stall oriented team (should still work until a3 but beyond that caecus needs very high investment)
also, since thais and aigis are both very contested supports, its often not a good idea to pair them together in d-tide
Thanks! Any particular notes for Caecus? I've used him previously, but he didn't seem to do that much damage
Does the main damage come from tentacles or something?
main damage comes from his 2 cost, you use it to stack counter and then use the counter to do most of the damage
sunfall is his best wheel but if you dont have that then pandia or wanda wheels can also work well
What's the best way to see what wheel corresponds to what awakener?
kaiden.gg lists which awakener a wheel belongs too under the wheel. but they also have a lot of dated info so I wouldn't rely on it too much.
Much appreciated!
morimens glossary is a pretty good resource
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/10UVim8m1SnY9fSDKfaH4AwnPPd22zsCDDNB6SV15yO4/edit?usp=drivesdk
